ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  Beta Drugs Limited reported robust Q1 FY27 consolidated results, with sales increasing 25.3% to Rs 125.55 crores and net profit growing 40.92% to Rs 16.5 crores, driven by strong segmental performance, improved gross margins from a favorable product mix, and reduced finance costs. A material red flag is present as the consolidated financial statements incorporate unaudited/unreviewed results from several key subsidiaries (representing over 50% of consolidated revenue), on which the auditor's opinion is based solely on management reports.
